TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Hillery_Brown, title = Hillery_Brown, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hillery_Brown} }

S.FORM: Hillery Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1912 , ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 7, Hillery Brown, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1991) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Hillery Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1912 , ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 7, Hillery Brown, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1991) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ħillerj βrown s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ħillerj βrown, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
